changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE question_branching_logic ( id serial, original_question_id integer DEFAULT NULL, question_id integer DEFAULT NULL, answer_id integer DEFAULT NULL, ordinal integer DEFAULT 0, operation integer DEFAULT 0, CONSTRAINT pk_question_branching_logic PRIMARY KEY (id) , CONSTRAINT fk_question_branching_logic_to_original_question FOREIGN KEY (original_question_id) REFERENCES qualitative_questions (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE , CONSTRAINT fk_question_branching_logic_to_question FOREIGN KEY (question_id) REFERENCES qualitative_questions (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE , CONSTRAINT fk_question_branching_logic_to_answer FOREIGN KEY (answer_id) REFERENCES qualitative_question_answers (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE ); CREATE INDEX i_question_branching_logic_original_question ON question_branching_logic (original_question_id); CREATE INDEX i_question_branching_logic_question ON question_branching_logic (question_id);
